历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 29196 → 32307 → 30376 → → 30492, fluctuating around the 30000–32000 range in recent years, with a baseline of about 30492 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Jiangsu Physics Category was 17 in 2021, 10 in 2022, 5 in 2023, and 9 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 16, an increase of about 77.8% compared to 9 in 2025, which will significantly lower the ranking threshold (ranking number increases).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Guizhou University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science ranking has risen from 135th in 2021 to 85th in 2026, enhancing overall attractiveness. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to inappropriate conditions set in recruitment announcements causing public opinion, but this incident has low relevance to undergraduate admissions. Douyin popularity ranks 76th, rated as average, without high attention. No signals related to Guizhou University were found in historical admission anomaly records. Plant Protection is an A- discipline, but has low relevance to Physics Category majors (Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Mechanical Design and Manufacturing, etc.). Overall engineering strength is at a mid-level among Project 211 universities.
6. [Major Popularity and Environment] The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangsu general college entrance examination is about 521,000, a significant increase from 2025. Based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 73%, the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in 2026 is about 380,000, an increase of about 46% from 260,000 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Social popularity of engineering majors such as Computer Science and Electrical Engineering remains high.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Guizhou University is located in the southwest region, far from Jiangsu, and the geographical preference for cross-province study has a certain inhibitory effect on Jiangsu candidates' willingness to apply. However, the significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment to 16 in 2026 helps increase its visibility in Jiangsu.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the comprehensive factors, the significant expansion of Physics Category enrollment by about 77.8% in 2026 is the most critical factor affecting rankings, which will significantly lower the admission threshold (ranking number increases). However, the increase of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu by about 46% creates a counteracting effect of intensified competition, and the continuous rise in Soft Science rankings and high popularity of engineering majors provide a positive pull. Taking into account the offsetting effects of the large increase in candidates and rising rankings, after a slight adjustment, the predicted minimum ranking is about 44522, with a range of 44022–45022.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<44022), you can focus on reaching for popular Computer Science majors.
